brand.name: Folioblox
brand.footerBlurb: I'm a product designer focused on building clean, intuitive interfaces that solve real-world problems.
brand.heroLead: From logo to language, I build brands that connect and convert.

faq.title: Answers to Common Questions
faq.text: From timelines to process details, here are quick answers to the most frequent questions I get.

items.question: How long does a brand identity project take?
items.answer: Most brand identity projects take between 4 and 8 weeks, depending on scope, feedback cadence, and the final deliverables.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes. Larger engagements can be split into milestone-based payments so the process stays flexible and manageable.

items.question: Can you also design my website?
items.answer: Yes. I can extend the brand system into landing pages, website layouts, and supporting digital assets.

items.question: Do you work with international clients?
items.answer: Yes. I regularly collaborate remotely across time zones with a process designed to stay clear, calm, and async-friendly.

items.question: What do I need to get started?
items.answer: A rough brief, your goals, and any existing brand context are enough to start the conversation and shape the direction.

globalCta.title: Let's Bring Your Brand to Life
globalCta.text: Ready to make something amazing together? Whether you're starting fresh or evolving your brand, I'm here to help.

home.trustedTitle: Trusted by Brands I’ve Helped Shape

behindDesigns.title: Shaping Experiences That Make Life Simpler
behindDesigns.text: I'm a product designer focused on building clean, intuitive interfaces that solve real-world problems.

featured.title: Designing Bold Brands That Leave a Lasting Impression
featured.text: With a passion for clarity, aesthetics, and emotion-driven design, I partner with founders and teams to create visual identities that truly connect.

approach.title: How I Approach Every Project
approach.text: I design with clarity and purpose, blending strategy and style to build brands that look great and work everywhere.

items.title: Strategy First
items.text: Every design decision is rooted in a clear brand strategy. No guesswork.

items.title: Design That Resonates
items.text: Visuals that connect emotionally and communicate clearly.

items.title: Future-Proof Systems
items.text: Design that’s flexible, scalable, and easy to use.

items.title: Consistency Across Touchpoints
items.text: From logo to social templates, I help you stay on-brand everywhere.

services.title: What I Can Help You With
services.text: From strategy to visuals, I offer tailored services to help your brand grow with clarity and impact.

items.title: Brand Identity Design
items.text: Logos, typography, color systems, and complete visual direction.

items.title: Brand Strategy
items.text: Positioning, messaging, and creative direction aligned with your goals.

items.title: Creative Consulting
items.text: Ongoing design support, art direction, and guidance for your brand team.

process.title: My Process, Step by Step
process.text: From first ideas to final assets, I follow a clear, collaborative process built to turn your vision into a brand that works and lasts.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: Understanding your vision, audience, and goals.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.text: Defining your unique positioning and messaging.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: Creating your visual identity system and touchpoints.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: Providing all assets, brand guidelines, and support.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.text: I stay available for updates, extensions, and evolution.

moreProjects.title: Curious What Else I’ve Created?
moreProjects.text: Explore more brand identities, packaging, and digital design work in my extended portfolio.

values.title: What Guides My Work
values.text: My mission, vision, and values are at the core of every project, guiding how I think, create, and collaborate to build brands that matter.

items.title: Mission
items.text: To help brands express their unique voice with clarity and beauty.

items.title: Vision
items.text: A world where thoughtful design drives meaningful connections.

items.title: Values
items.text: Simplicity, empathy, creativity, and strategic thinking.

items.title: Design Philosophy
items.text: Good design solves problems and tells stories that stick.

aboutTeaser.title: Designer. Strategist. Creative partner.
aboutTeaser.subtitle: Blending clarity and creativity to build brands with purpose.
body: I’m Dominic Wagner, a freelance brand designer with 15 years of experience helping startups, creatives, and growing businesses build identities that feel like them. With a background in design, marketing, art direction, and brand strategy.
I bring a balance of strategy and style to every project. Whether it's your first brand or a full refresh, I’m here to guide you every step of the way.

servicesGallery.title: What I Specialize In
servicesGallery.text: Focused expertise in branding, packaging, and digital.
items: Digital touchpoints that carry the brand forward

pricing.title: Simple Packages for Every Stage
pricing.text: Clear, flexible packages built to fit your brand’s stage.

plans.name: Pro plan
plans.description: Ideal for businesses ready to scale.

about.heroText: Design rooted in strategy, driven by purpose.

story.title: Design with Purpose and Personality
story.subtitle: Shaping meaningful brands through strategy, creativity, and collaboration.
body: I’m a brand designer with a passion for building visual identities that feel as good as they look. My approach blends strategy and creativity to help brands show up with clarity, confidence, and meaning. I believe that design is more than decoration. It is a tool for communication, connection, and growth.

With years of experience working with startups, creative entrepreneurs, and established businesses, I’ve developed a process that’s both collaborative and thoughtful. Every project begins with understanding your goals, your audience, and what makes you different. From there, we build a brand that speaks your truth and resonates at every touchpoint.
Whether you're launching something new or refining an existing brand, I’m here to guide you through the journey, offering not just design, but direction, partnership, and care every step of the way.

ctaPanel.title: Ready to Build a Brand That Feels Like You?
ctaPanel.text: If you’re looking for thoughtful design and a collaborative process, I’d love to hear from you. Let’s create something that lasts.

recentWork.title: Latest Projects & Collaborations
recentWork.text: A look at what I’ve been working on lately: designs, stories, and creative partnerships.

items.title: Kin Studio
items.text: A calming, minimalist identity for a boutique wellness brand focused on balance and self-care.

items.title: Field Coffee Co.
items.text: Crafted a warm, earthy visual system for a specialty coffee shop blending community and quality.

items.title: Nord Agency
items.text: Rebranding a digital agency with a bold, modern identity that reflects clarity and confidence.

items.title: Lune Journal
items.text: Developed a soft, editorial brand for an independent print publication focused on slow living.

services.title: Design solutions built to grow with your brand.
services.text: From strategy to execution, I offer creative services that bring clarity, consistency, and impact to every brand touchpoint.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.text: Logos, color palettes, and full visual systems that define your brand’s look and feel.

items.title: Brand Strategy
items.text: Positioning, messaging, and brand voice to give your visuals a clear direction.

items.title: Packaging Design
items.text: Custom, eye-catching packaging that tells your product’s story at first glance.

items.title: Web & Digital Assets
items.text: On-brand website layouts, social templates, and digital design support.

awards.title: Proud Moments, Shared Success
awards.text: A few highlights from industry juries and design communities who’ve recognized the work.

items.name: Awwwards
items.text: Recognized for innovation and visual storytelling in the rebranding of a creative agency.

items.name: Indigo Design Award
items.text: Awarded for best use of minimalist design in wellness branding.

items.name: CSS Design Awards
items.text: Honored for standout UI/UX and aesthetic harmony across web and packaging.

items.name: Behance Interaction
items.text: Selected for exceptional editorial layout and cohesive visual identity.

projectsPage.heroText: Take a closer look at how strategy and design come together to build brands that connect and endure.
projectsPage.introTitle: Bringing Brands to Life Through Design
projectsPage.introText: A curated collection of visual identities, packaging, and creative systems built for impact.

contact.heroText: Let’s build something great together. Start the conversation today.
contact.introText: Whether you're starting from scratch or need a brand refresh, I’m here to help bring your vision to life.
contact.introBody: Ready to talk? Fill out the form or drop me a message. Let’s see how we can work together.

support.title: Thoughtful process
support.text: Clear scope, calm communication, and focused deliverables from day one.

support.title: Fast first response
support.text: New inquiries usually get a reply within 2 to 3 business days.

support.title: Flexible collaboration
support.text: Ideal for brand launches, refreshes, campaign work, and design support.

quickAnswers.title: Shaping Experiences That Make Life Simpler

items.question: What is Framer?
items.answer: A modern website builder centered around visual editing, polished interactions, and design-driven publishing.

items.question: Is it easy to learn?
items.answer: It is approachable for designers and marketers, especially when the structure is already in place.

items.question: Do I need to code?
items.answer: Not for the template itself, though custom code can extend the experience when you need something bespoke.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Message
fields.placeholder: Tell me a little about the project

projects.title: Dream Area
projects.cardText: The image shows flowing shapes in iridescent hues, from deep blues and purples to vibrant pinks and oranges, creating an ethereal effect.
projects.leadA: The picture showcases an artistic medley of undulating shapes, strikingly portrayed in a palette of shimmering tints that span from rich blues and purples to electrifying pinks and oranges, crafting a dreamlike visual spectacle. These sleek, ribbon-like figures twist and weave amongst one another, conveying a sense of kinetic energy and smooth fluidity.
projects.leadB: Set against a minimalist, softly gradient light peach backdrop, the intricate, glossy shapes take center stage. Their polished finish implies a three-dimensional aspect, making them resemble objects fashioned from a gleaming, liquid-like substance. This piece might conjure themes of harmony, interconnectivity, and digital-forward aesthetics thanks to its silken texture and flawless color transitions.
projects.challenge: The picture showcases an artistic medley of undulating shapes, strikingly portrayed in a palette of shimmering tints that span from rich blues and purples to electrifying pinks and oranges, crafting a dreamlike visual spectacle. These sleek, ribbon-like figures twist and weave amongst one another, conveying a sense of kinetic energy and smooth fluidity. Set against a minimalist, softly gradient light peach backdrop, the intricate, glossy shapes take center stage. Their polished finish implies a three-dimensional aspect, making them resemble objects fashioned from a gleaming, liquid-like substance. This piece might conjure various interpretations, from themes of harmony and interconnectivity to a sense of digital or avant-garde aesthetics, thanks to its silken texture and flawless color transitions.

projects.title: Orange Blox
projects.cardText: The image shows flowing shapes in iridescent hues, from deep blues and purples to vibrant pinks and oranges, creating an ethereal effect.

projects.challenge: Our client struggled to attract and retain customers because their outdated, non-responsive website did not align with their brand identity.
projects.goal: We aimed to create a modern, visually appealing website that reflected the client’s brand and provided a seamless user experience. The site needed to be responsive, easy to navigate, and optimized for search engines to enhance online visibility.
projects.result: Our team created a custom website design that is visually stunning, user-friendly, and optimized for search engines. The client’s site now professionally showcases their products and services, resulting in significant increases in organic traffic and customer engagement. The client is thrilled with the outcome and has received positive feedback from customers.
